Welcome

Alfa Flooring

Alfa Flooring has been serving Cleveland and the surrounding region with premium flooring contractor services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Cleveland Trusts Alfa Flooring

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment

“
Alfa Flooring did an amazing job installing new hardwood floors in my Tremont home. The team was professional, efficient, and the floors look absolutely stunning. They even helped me choose the perfect stain to match my existing decor. Highly recommend!
— Sarah M.
